scripts.db:reset:local: wrangler d1 execute hackathon --local --command="DROP TABLE IF EXISTS Comment; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS Interest; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS TeamMember; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS Idea; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS Participant; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS AppSetting;" && pnpm run db:apply:local
scripts.db:reset:remote: wrangler d1 execute hackathon --remote --command="DROP TABLE IF EXISTS Comment; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS Interest; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS TeamMember; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS Idea; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS Participant; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS AppSetting;" && pnpm run db:apply:remote
